zh.lifeSummary: 當Godefroy d'Auvergne-Boulogne於大約1319年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅布洛-素-梅-素德時，他的父親Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne38歲，母親Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde31歲。他於1375年8月3日與Jeanne de Ventadour結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1387年3月22日享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godefroy d'Auvergne-Boulogne于大约1319年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅布洛-素-梅-素德时，他的父亲Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne38岁，母亲Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde31岁。他于1375年8月3日与Jeanne de Ventadour结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1387年3月22日享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Godefroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from the personal name Godefroy, from ancient Germanic Godafrid, composed of the elements god ‘god’ and frid ‘peace’. This surname is also found in England, where it is of Huguenot origin. Compare Godfroy .

variants.name: Godfroy
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

variants.name: Goffin
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational from German Hopfen ‘hops’. The initial g is due to Russian influence, since Russian has no h and alters it to g in borrowed words and names.
French and Walloon: from a pet form of the personal name   Godefroy  .
French and Walloon: possibly also a nickname from a diminutive of Old French goffe ‘heavy, coarse’.

en.lifeSummary: When Godefroy d'Auvergne-Boulogne was born about 1319, in Boulogne-sur-Mer-Sud, Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne, was 38 and his mother, Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde, was 31. He married Jeanne de Ventadour on 3 August 1375. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 22 March 1387, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godefroy d'Auvergne-Boulogne est né environ 1319, à Boulogne-sur-Mer-Sud, Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Ventadour le 3 août 1375. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 mars 1387, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godefroy d'Auvergne-Boulogne um 1319 in Boulogne-sur-Mer-Sud, Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne 38 und seine Mutter Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde 31. Er hat am 3. August 1375 Jeanne de Ventadour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. März 1387 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godefroy d'Auvergne-Boulogne è nato il circa 1319 nel Boulogne-sur-Mer-Sud, Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Ventadour il 3 agosto 1375. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 22 marzo 1387, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Godefroy d'Auvergne-Boulogneが約1319年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーボウログネ-スル-メル-スドで生まれた時，父Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogneは38歳，母Marie De Flandre-Tenremondeは31歳であった。1375年8月3日にJeanne de Ventadourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1387年3月22日に69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Godefroy d'Auvergne-Boulogne(이)가 대략 1319년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머 부로그니-수-머-수드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1375년 8월 3일 Jeanne de Ventadour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 3월 22일 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godefroy d'Auvergne-Boulogne nasceu aproximadamente 1319, em Boulogne-sur-Mer-Sud, Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Ventadour em 3 de agosto de 1375. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de março de 1387, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godefroy d'Auvergne-Boulogne родился около 1319 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир-суд, боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Ventadour 3 августа 1375 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 22 марта 1387 г. в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godefroy d'Auvergne-Boulogne nació aproximadamente 1319, en Boulogne-sur-Mer-Sud, Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Robert d'Auvergne Count of Auvergne Count of Boulogne, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Marie De Flandre-Tenremonde, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Ventadour el 3 de agosto de 1375. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1387, a la edad de 69 años.
